package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingLazyOnceHidesSlowFirstRequest() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_lazy_once_hides_slow_first_request"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Lazy loading. Flag sync.Once lazy initialization on request paths without warmup or latency accounting."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
